title: festuca quadriflora
intro: Festuca quadriflora, also known as four-flowered fescue, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. The medicinal properties of Festuca quadriflora lie in its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, including soothing bronchitis and asthma symptoms, and may also have antimicrobial effects. Traditionally, Festuca quadriflora has been used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which are made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water.
